captions: progressive house, building pads, euphoric drop, four on the floor, festival anthem, soaring synth lead, hands up
deep house, groovy bassline, subtle vocals, warm chords, hypnotic rhythm, underground club, late night
melodic techno, driving beat, atmospheric textures, dark and dreamy, analog synths, pulsing bass, rave energy
future bass, lush synth chords, heavy drops, chopped vocal samples, colorful production, emotional, festival ready
lyrics:
[Build]
Feel the bass beneath your feet
Let the rhythm take control
Every heartbeat syncs the beat
Lose yourself and free your soul

[Drop]

[Verse]
Lasers cutting through the haze
Bass is shaking every wall
Lost inside this endless maze
We don't need a reason at all

[Build]
Hands up, reach for the sky
Feel the energy rise
This is where we come alive
Underneath the neon lights

[Drop]

[Outro]
One more time
Feel it rise
One more time
